## What happened?
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include any error messages.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment
- **Device:** (Desktop / Mobile / Tablet)
- **Browser:** (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)
- **Plan:** (Starter / Professional / Elite / Free Trial)
- **Page/Feature:** (e.g., AI Professor, Scenario Simulation, Dashboard)

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem here.

> Thank you for helping make Tech Passport better! We'll respond within 24-48 hours. 🙏
